hero.name: Talvin Ackbaraly
hero.headline: Engineering student specialized in Computer Vision, AI & GPU Computing
hero.status: Looking for a 6-month internship — Starting early Feb. 2027

about.title: About Me
about.intro: As an engineering student at EPITA, I specialize in computer vision, artificial intelligence, and GPU computing. Following a first internship in full-stack & DevOps development completed during my core curriculum, I am now looking to apply my specialized skills during a 6-month final-year internship starting in early February 2027.

education.description: Image processing & synthesis, artificial intelligence, and GPU computing.

education.degree: High School Diploma — Majors in Mathematics & CS

items.title: Full-Stack & DevOps Developer
items.description: Development of an internal web platform for managing movie catalog rights, contracts, and distribution modules. Built full-stack features and set up CI/CD cloud infrastructure on AWS within an Agile team.

items.title: IT Consultant
items.description: Design and development of a management application prototype (suppliers, products, contracts) for enterprise client Sonepar using the Django framework and applying the Agile SAFe methodology.

items.name: PFEE — BNF
items.title: Segmentation & Classification of Heritage Illustrations
items.tagline: Automatic detection of illustrations in digitized heritage documents, in partnership with the BNF.

items.name: ALPR
items.title: Automatic License Plate Recognition
items.tagline: Complete ALPR system without Deep Learning (Classical Vision + Machine Learning), with rigorous Python vs C++ benchmarks.

items.name: IRGPU
items.title: Real-Time Video Motion Detection — GPU Port
items.tagline: CPU → GPU port of a real-time algorithm achieving a ×24 performance gain via CUDA.

items.name: MedViz
items.title: Medical Prediction & 3D Visualization
items.tagline: Full FVC prediction pipeline from pulmonary CT scans, with 3D web visualization.

items.name: POGL
items.title: Real-Time Fluid Simulation
items.tagline: SPH simulation engine rendered in real time with OpenGL, all physics offloaded to the GPU.

items.name: TinyX
items.title: Social Network Clone
items.tagline: Twitter-like social platform built by a team of 14 with microservices architecture and rigorous DevOps.

items.name: Tiger
items.title: Full Compiler Construction
items.tagline: Implementation of a compiler for the Tiger language, from lexical analysis to type checking.

items.name: OCR Sudoku
items.title: Digit Recognition & Sudoku Solver
items.tagline: Complete pipeline: grid detection, OCR via CNN trained from scratch, and automatic solving.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: I am actively looking for a 6-month final-year internship starting in early February 2027. Feel free to reach out to discuss opportunities.
